hall_of_fame.title: Consider re-licensing to AL v2.0, as RocksDB has just done
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: The open-source community's shift towards more permissive licenses like AL v2.0 makes re-licensing feasible.

hall_of_fame.title: [React 19] Disabling prerendering siblings of suspended components breaking common pattern
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: React's concurrent rendering advancements and new Cache API enable a solution.

hall_of_fame.title: Add upcoming GPT-3 model
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: GPT-3's massive success and widespread adoption make its integration crucial for the Transformers library.

last_resurrection.title: proposal: Go 2: Have functions auto-implement interfaces with only a single method of that same signature
last_resurrection.one_line_why: The Go language's type system has evolved with the introduction of generics and the 'any' type, making this feature more.
